name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except vegetable cooking spray.
2. Pour mixture into a baking dish coated with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Bake at 325°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until firm.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STRACH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 55
